rationale: Zustand is a pnpm-managed TypeScript library with a pnpm-lock.yaml and pnpm-workspace.yaml; aspect_rules_js + aspect_rules_ts + aspect_gazelle_js can generate a fine-grained ts_project/npm_link graph for the src tree.
module_bazel:
module(
    name = "zustand",
    version = "0.0.0",
)

bazel_dep(name = "aspect_rules_js", version = "3.2.2")
bazel_dep(name = "aspect_rules_ts", version = "3.8.11")
bazel_dep(name = "aspect_gazelle_js", version = "1.1.0")
bazel_dep(name = "gazelle", version = "0.51.3")
bazel_dep(name = "bazel_skylib", version = "1.9.0")
bazel_dep(name = "platforms", version = "1.1.0")

####### Node.js toolchain (hermetic) #######
node = use_extension("@aspect_rules_js//npm:extensions.bzl", "node", dev_dependency = True)
node.toolchain(node_version = "20.11.1")

####### pnpm-based npm deps #######
npm = use_extension("@aspect_rules_js//npm:extensions.bzl", "npm", dev_dependency = True)
npm.npm_translate_lock(
    name = "npm",
    pnpm_lock = "//:pnpm-lock.yaml",
    verify_node_modules_ignored = "//:.bazelignore",
)
use_repo(npm, "npm")

pnpm = use_extension("@aspect_rules_js//npm:extensions.bzl", "pnpm")
use_repo(pnpm, "pnpm")

####### TypeScript toolchain #######
rules_ts_ext = use_extension("@aspect_rules_ts//ts:extensions.bzl", "ext", dev_dependency = True)
rules_ts_ext.deps(
    ts_version_from = "//:package.json",
)
use_repo(rules_ts_ext, "npm_typescript")
root_build:
load("@aspect_rules_js//npm:defs.bzl", "npm_link_all_packages")
load("@aspect_gazelle_js//gazelle:defs.bzl", "gazelle", "gazelle_binary")

npm_link_all_packages(name = "node_modules")

# gazelle:js_npm_package_target_name node_modules
# gazelle:exclude examples
# gazelle:exclude docs
# gazelle:exclude node_modules

gazelle_binary(
    name = "gazelle_bin",
    languages = ["@aspect_gazelle_js//gazelle/js"],
)

gazelle(
    name = "gazelle",
    gazelle = ":gazelle_bin",
)
anticipated_risks: pnpm-workspace with example sub-packages may confuse lock translation
vitest test runner not natively wired by gazelle (tests may not run as bazel test)
